blocks.content: He turned to Cassandra. He held both her hands.

blocks.speaker: Pastor
blocks.content: To have and to hold, from this day forward —

blocks.speaker: Ethan
blocks.content: To have and to hold, from this day forward —

He paused here — not long, just a breath — and she saw it. The weight he put on those words. Not the recitation weight. The real weight. The weight of someone who knows exactly what he is promising and has already thought through every version of it.

blocks.speaker: Pastor
blocks.content: To love and to cherish, until death do us part.

blocks.speaker: Ethan
blocks.content: To love and to cherish, until death do us part.
Cassandra was crying. She hadn't noticed until just now.
